name: Memescan Bot
tagline: Solana meme coin detector — Z-score anomaly detection, RugCheck safety filters, backtest engine with Sharpe ratio, 5-tab Streamlit dashboard
description: Scans DexScreener for Solana meme coins. Z-score anomaly detection across 5 rolling windows (5m to 24h). RugCheck API for LP lock, honeypot, holder concentration. Twitter mention velocity scanner. Full backtest engine: simulates buy at detection with configurable TP targets, computes win rate, Sharpe ratio, profit factor, max drawdown, equity curve. 5-tab Streamlit dashboard. 8 CLI commands.
content_angles: Automated meme coin detection and analysis
Early signal detection for new token launches
